Kaufland was their major client and they supplied all the above ranges to them until Covid-19.
For Lidl, they supplied Table Linen (Runners, Placemats, Table cloth, etc.) and Cushions.
The supplier also got The Best Supplier Certificate from Kaufland before Covid-19. 
Post Covid, they said the Lidl office in India closed and now they are working through wholesalers.
They are keen to work directly with LIDL through us.
